  path={"/devices/definitions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"},{"name":"deviceIds","in":"query","required":true,"description":"设备ID列表（当前一次最多支持10个设备ID）","schema":{"type":"array","maxItems":10,"items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"includeValues","in":"query","required":false,"description":"是否包含各 trait 的当前值（`value`）与上报时间（`time`）。默认 `false` 时仅返回能力定义元数据，结构与 `true` 相同但trait值value字段可能为空或是不准确的旧值；为 `true` 时会拉取设备的当前trait值。\n","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  label={undefined}

indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","name","deviceTypesList","endpoints"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"设备名称"},"deviceTypesList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"设备类型列表"},"endpoints":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["endpointId","endpointName","deviceType","functions"],"properties":{"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点ID"},"endpointName":{"type":"string","description":"端点名称"},"deviceType":{"type":"string","description":"设备类型"},"functions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["functionCode"],"properties":{"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码（如
